statement.en: Advancing AI-driven Product Defect Detection in Engineering Management: from Fine-Grained Defect Information Extraction to Decision Support and Structured Knowledge Management

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25) proposing an applied AI system for defect detection. The axiom combines proven ML techniques (fine-grained extraction, decision support) with domain-specific engineering application. Core claims are not yet peer-validated; the system architecture and performance metrics exist in provisional state pending empirical validation and publication review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 欠陥という散らばった情報を統合すれば、体系的な知識が最善の判断を生む。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 細粒な欠陥情報が収束し、中心の決定点へ流れ込む像。
